subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One desired to make mention of him who hath quaffed the nectar of certitude, when they who denied the All-Merciful barred Him therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم اراد ان یذکر من شرب رحیق البرهان اذ منع عنه الذین کفروا بالرحمن و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @soul; spirit after death
